rule_prompt: Check whether personal or sensitive data collection has explicit scope, legal basis, and minimization controls.
Check whether role-based access, least privilege, and account revocation workflow are defined and enforceable.
Check whether policy rules can be traced to runtime decisions with auditable records.
Check whether methodology includes clear steps, parameter ranges, and evaluation setup.
Check whether key claims are supported by quantitative evidence, baselines, and limitations.
Check whether wording remains objective, precise, and avoids unsupported absolute statements.
